description: Run the SD update-spec workflow.
mode: agent

# Update Spec

Run the SD update-spec wrapper for the current repository.

1. Read `.agents/skills/sd-update-spec/SKILL.md`.
2. Follow that skill exactly: run Trellis update-spec first, then run the pack
   extensions for repospec artifacts, architecture overview, and `.obsidian-kb`.
3. Report the update-spec skill used, spec changes, repospec/architecture/
   Obsidian KB results, vault-link guidance, and validation.
